_meta.failure_shape: v2.2.0 Verified-live discipline — failure mode (A): GESTURE SUBSTITUTION
_meta.originating_failure: heirship-app-v2 R4 (dropdown won't close): the prior 'test' clicked the empty page-corner (8, 8) which lands on the dropdown's own full-screen backdrop. So it only ever exercised the path that already worked (clicking the backdrop closes the dropdown) and never the real gesture (clicking another field to close the dropdown). Agent reported the bug fixed; the bug was NOT fixed.

click_targets.comment: prior agent's test clicked (8,8) on the page corner, landing on the dropdown's backdrop

verification_artifact.observed_state: Affiant dropdown is open; backdrop visible

bug_description.summary: Dropdown doesn't close when user clicks another field
bug_description.gesture_pattern: click any field outside the dropdown (a date input, a text field, a button) to close the dropdown

_corrected_verification_artifact._note: what a correct verification looks like — clicks an actual user-gesture target (a sibling field), not the backdrop
